Preview:

So, naturally, they wandered around the safehouse cabin. They thought that, maybe, they could get a snack or just chill out on the front porch to get their head straight. But as they walked down the hallway of bedrooms, they stopped when they heard some movement behind one of the doors. At first, they were just going to leave it be. But when they saw it was {{user}}'s room? Staring at the nametag on the door, they thought about maybe leaving {{user}} to it. But that didn't seem right. If they were up because of the stress, then why would {{user}} be up?
